original: Pointing the twin barrels of her rifle in your general direction, she unloads a concentrated blast of energy at you.
context: <<POS:00468029>> combatOutput("Pointing the twin barrels of her rifle in your general direction, she unloads a concentrated blast of energy at you.",null,this)

original: It hits you squarely on your chest!
context: <<POS:00468218>> combatAppend(" It hits you squarely on your chest!")

original: No matter what you try, she keeps her aim dead centered on you and fires a single, high-powered beam of laser directly at your chest!
context: <<POS:00468547>> combatOutput("No matter what you try, she keeps her aim dead centered on you and fires a single, high-powered beam of laser directly at your chest!",null,this)
<<POS:00468724>> combatAppend(" You barely dodge her shot!")

original: You stagger as the laser bolt hits you squarely on the chest!
context: <<POS:00468769>> combatAppend(" You stagger as the laser bolt hits you squarely on the chest!")

original: She flips a switch on her rifle and points it your way before unloading a barrage of lasers at you.
context: <<POS:00469007>> combatOutput("She flips a switch on her rifle and points it your way before unloading a barrage of lasers at you.",null,this)

original: One of the rapidly shot energy charges goes wide!
context: <<POS:00469172>> combatAppend("\nOne of the rapidly shot energy charges goes wide!")

original: One of the rapidly shot energy charges hits you!
context: <<POS:00469241>> combatAppend("\nOne of the rapidly shot energy charges hits you!")

original: Not being able to use her rifle of choice, she pulls out her revolver and fires a quick shot at you.
context: <<POS:00469466>> combatOutput("Not being able to use her rifle of choice, she pulls out her revolver and fires a quick shot at you.",null,this)

original: You hear the ricochet of the bullet flying off onto a random direction.
context: <<POS:00469861>> combatAppend(" You hear the ricochet of the bullet flying off onto a random direction.")
<<POS:00469951>> combatAppend(" The lead projectile hits you.")

original: “You "+{var0}.mf("dick","bitch")+"!” she shrieks as her cybernetics come back online. She hammers a command into her forearm-mounted computer. Moments later there’s a flicker around her frame.
context: <> <> combatOutput("“You "+e.mf("dick","bitch")+"!” she shrieks as her cybernetics come back online. She hammers a command into her forearm-mounted computer. Moments later there’s a flicker around her frame.",null,this)

original: You doubt that the EMP is going to work again.
context: <> combatAppend("\n\nYou doubt that the EMP is going to work again.")

original: Instead of shooting at you, she stares at you unblinkingly. You don’t like the glint in her eyes.
context: <<POS:00470549>> combatOutput("Instead of shooting at you, she stares at you unblinkingly. You don’t like the glint in her eyes.",null,this)

original: “Don’t think this is over yet.” she says before punching a command into her wrist computer. Her shields flicker back to life. She’s not out of the fight yet!
context: <> combatOutput("“Don’t think this is over yet.” she says before punching a command into her wrist computer. Her shields flicker back to life. She’s not out of the fight yet!",null,this)

original: “Take a deep breath now,” she taunts you as she slings a grenade in your direction. Before you can react, you’re surrounded by a thick green cloud!
context: <> combatOutput("“Take a deep breath now,” she taunts you as she slings a grenade in your direction. Before you can react, you’re surrounded by a thick green cloud!",null,this)

original: The gabilani cyborg grabs a black grenade from her belt and throws it at you. The moment it lands, it fills the air with a cloud of dense, dark smoke, blinding you!
context: <> combatOutput("The gabilani cyborg grabs a black grenade from her belt and throws it at you. The moment it lands, it fills the air with a cloud of dense, dark smoke, blinding you!",null,this)

original: “You won’t be dodging after this!” the metallic gabilani promises, hucking a hissing grenade your way!
context: <> combatOutput("“You won’t be dodging after this!” the metallic gabilani promises, hucking a hissing grenade your way!",null,this)

original: What a waste of time. It won’t affect you through your airtight equipment!
context: <<POS:00472081>> combatAppend("What a waste of time. It won’t affect you through your airtight equipment!")

original: While you don’t see the gas emerging, its effects make themselves known soon enough. You are paralyzed!.
context: <> combatAppend(" While you don’t see the gas emerging, its effects make themselves known soon enough. You are paralyzed!.")
